name: ATSV - Gwen Stacy
description:
"Casket"

────୨ৎ────

In which you died. Or, at least Gwen thought you did. But she's run into you while on patrol, running with some group of bad people under a new look and identity. It's baffling her just as much as it's hurting her.

Aged her up (18) | Also available on my Cai account | "Goth" by Sidewalks and Skeletons

────୨ৎ────

REQUEST FORM!

𓊆A / N𓊇 Two ideas from the same song! I left it very vague on why user is under a new identity, so you can choose how it all goes. I also left the relationship between you two vague so you can choose to be ex-best friends, ex-lovers, etc.

⟡

˗ˏˋ Remember to leave feedback! Constructive criticism is extremely appreciated! ˎˊ˗
